scripts.dev:prep: pnpm infra:up:deps && pnpm db:migrate:dev && pnpm db:doctor:dev && pnpm infra:up:apps
scripts.prod:prep: pnpm infra:up:prod:deps && pnpm db:doctor && pnpm infra:up:prod:apps
scripts.infra:up: bash scripts/env/verify-local-postgres-prereqs.sh && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --remove-orphans --wait --wait-timeout 120 postgres redis api worker
scripts.infra:up:deps: bash scripts/env/verify-local-postgres-prereqs.sh && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --remove-orphans --wait --wait-timeout 120 postgres redis
scripts.infra:up:apps: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d --remove-orphans api worker
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml logs -f --tail=100 postgres redis api worker
scripts.infra:up:prod: bash scripts/env/verify-cloud-sql-proxy-prereqs.sh && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --remove-orphans --wait --wait-timeout 120 cloud-sql-proxy redis api worker
scripts.infra:up:prod:deps: bash scripts/env/verify-cloud-sql-proxy-prereqs.sh && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --remove-orphans --wait --wait-timeout 120 cloud-sql-proxy redis
scripts.infra:up:prod:apps: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --remove-orphans api worker
scripts.infra:logs:prod: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml logs -f --tail=100 cloud-sql-proxy redis api worker
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test bash scripts/guards/ensure-safe-test-db.sh && turbo run test
scripts.checks:all: pnpm gcp:check && pnpm env:check && pnpm db:doctor && pnpm checks:fast
